news.summary: Buterin emphasized the importance of focusing not only on preventing crypto theft through hacks but also on accidental losses.

news.headline: Bitcoin price indicator now at ‘optimal DCA’ levels last seen at $50-70K range, presenting a rare opportunity to buy with key indicators showing discount.
news.summary: The recent significant Bitcoin sell-off has created a unique opportunity to gradually invest using the dollar-cost-averaging strategy, as important onchain indicators indicate that BTC is trading below its potential value. This presents investors with the chance to acquire Bitcoin at a discounted price compared to its recent high levels.

news.headline: ANI Pharmaceuticals reported Q4 EPS of $1.63, up from $1 a year ago, with sales of $190.57M, up 44.8%. Rare disease revenues rose 108.5%.
news.summary: ANI Pharmaceuticals Inc (NASDAQ:ANIP) announced their fourth-quarter adjusted EPS at $1.63, rising from $1 compared to the previous year, surpassing the expected $1.44. The reported sales were $190.57 million, marking a 44.8% increase from the previous year and exceeding the expected $175.37 million. Excluding the acquisition of Alimera, total net revenue saw a 23.8% year-over-year rise on an organic basis. Net revenues for rare diseases, inclusive of Cortrophin Gel, Iluvien, and Yutiq, surged by 108.5% to $87.0 million. Cortrophin Gel net revenues grew by 42.3% to $59.4 million, primarily due to higher volume. Iluvien and Yutiq jointly generated net revenues of $27.6 million. The company's focus is shifting towards high-margin brand assets, signaling strong potential, according to analysts.

Global Prosthetic Disc Nucleus Market to reach over $265.8 million by 2034 due to growth in minimally invasive surgeries and technology advancements. Market valued at $110.6 million in 2023 with a projected CAGR of 8.2% from 2024 to 2034. Leading companies include Zimmer Biomet, Medtronic, Orthofix Holdings, among others, with startups like NuCore Medical and AxioMed Spine Corporation innovating in the field. Trends include biocompatibility, biomechanics, and AI-powered pre-surgical planning.
news.summary: The Global Prosthetic Disc Nucleus Market, valued at USD 110.6 million in 2023, is projected to grow at a CAGR of 8.2% from 2024 to 2034, reaching over USD 265.8 million by 2034. This growth is fueled by factors such as increasing spinal disorders, demand for minimally invasive spine surgeries, and advancements in prosthetic disc technology. Key market players include Zimmer Biomet, Medtronic, Orthofix Holdings, Inc., Spinal Kinetics, and Globus Medical. Emerging startups like NuCore Medical, AxioMed Spine Corporation, and ReGelTec are also contributing to market advancements. Trends like biocompatibility, biomechanics, and AI-driven pre-surgical planning are shaping the next generation of spinal disc replacements. The market is set for expansion due to rising spine disorders, demand for minimally invasive surgeries, technological innovations like 3D printing, and integration of regenerative medicine.

news.headline: Report by Inflection AI & GAI Insights shows benefits of in-house AI, warns against cloud reliance.
news.summary: A recent report by Inflection AI and GAI Insights in San Francisco delves into the comparison of costs and benefits associated with various AI deployment strategies for businesses. The study indicates that exclusive dependence on cloud-based AI inference may result in increased expenses, potential IP security vulnerabilities, and being tied to a specific vendor. Conversely, enterprises opting to internalize inference operations, as opposed to outsourcing from a supplier, stand to reap substantial financial and strategic benefits that grow over time.

news.headline: Karate Combat to hold fights at Miami stadium named after Bonk Meme Coin, hosting 50% of events there.
news.summary: Karate Combat, a fighting league powered by cryptocurrency, will be holding 50% of its upcoming events at the newly constructed Bonk Stadium located in Miami.

news.headline: Keysight introduces Physical Layer Receiver Test Solution for MultiGBASE-T1, expands Automotive Ethernet Rx Compliance Solution. #ADAS #KEYS
news.summary: Leading technology company Keysight Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: KEYS) has unveiled an updated version of its Automotive Ethernet Rx Compliance Solution in SANTA ROSA, Calif. This latest iteration now provides backing for MultiGBASE-T1 data rates, showcasing new Receiver Test compliance software designed for Automotive Ethernet MultiGBASE-T1. Additionally, the solution includes a bespoke Noise Injection Fixture tailored to bolster the evolving automotive in-vehicle networks. This development caters to the rise of next-generation advanced driver-assistance systems (ADAS), underscoring Keysight's commitment to innovation in the automotive sector.

news.headline: AB Pieno žvaigždės' 2024 sales revenue hits EUR 210.4 million, up by 4.6% from 2023's EUR 201.1 million.
news.summary: In unofficial unaudited records, AB Pieno žvaigždės reported sales revenue of EUR 210.4 million in 2024, showcasing a 4.6% increase from the previous year's EUR 201.1 million.

news.headline: Webus International Limited closes IPO of 2 million shares at $4 each, offering AI-driven chauffeur services.
news.summary: Hangzhou, China - On February 28, 2025, Webus International Limited, a prominent provider of AI-powered mobility solutions focusing on personalized chauffeur services globally, revealed the completion of its initial public offering (IPO). The Offering consisted of 2,000,000 ordinary shares priced at $4.00 per share for public purchase. Trading under the ticker symbol "WETO" on NASDAQ, the Company is known for its premium and customizable chauffeur services driven by artificial intelligence technology.

news.headline: Verizon CFO Tony Skiadas to speak at Morgan Stanley TMT Conference on March 4 at 11:30 a.m. ET.

news.headline: Michael Saylor pitches for US supremacy in Bitcoin, met House Financial Services Committee Chair Rep. French Hill, discussed making US a global leader in Bitcoin. Presented 'Digital Assets Framework'.
news.summary: Michael Saylor, co-founder of Strategy Inc. (NASDAQ:MSTR), recently met with House Financial Services Committee Chair Rep. French Hill (R-AR) to discuss plans for the U.S. to become a key player in Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC). Saylor shared in a post that the meeting took place on Tuesday and involved talks about digital assets and the country's potential to lead in the cryptocurrency space. During the discussion, Saylor presented his 'Digital Assets Framework,' a strategy focused on integrating digital assets into the U.S. economy. Stay informed by checking out the full story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: OpenTeams partners with O-SAIF to ensure AI safety and transparency in US government systems; aims to educate on risks of closed-source AI.
news.summary: OpenTeams, a leading provider of customizable open source artificial intelligence solutions that prioritize data protection and uphold principles of flexibility, transparency, and ethics, has revealed its collaboration with the Open-Source AI Foundation (O-SAIF). O-SAIF, a recently established advocacy organization, is dedicated to promoting transparency and responsibility in AI technology implemented by non-military government bodies. The foundation's objective is to inform legislators, policy creators, and the public about the potential dangers associated with closed-source AI applications in civilian settings.

(NYSE American: BTTR), a company focused on pet health and wellness, revealed that SRx Health Solutions, Inc. was given the green light by the Ontario Superior Court of Justice to move forward with the acquisition. This final Order represents a significant step in the acquisition process, solidifying the deal between Better Choice Company and SRx. news.headline: Richard Clark of Accenture joins MITRE Board of Trustees; bringing finance and technology expertise for challenges.
news.summary: A recent announcement from McLean, VA revealed that Richard Clark, a former Accenture executive specializing in global finance and transformation, has been appointed to the Board of Trustees at MITRE. The decision was made by MITRE's Board of Trustees, with their President and CEO, Mark Peters, expressing confidence in Clark's capabilities. Peters highlighted Clark's unique skillset, emphasizing his proficiency in merging financial expertise with technology and strategic planning. Clark's extensive knowledge in governance, finance, and digital systems is seen as valuable for MITRE as it tackles the nation's most pressing issues. This appointment underlines MITRE's commitment to driving innovation and finding solutions for key challenges.

news.headline: Bitlayer's partnership with five blockchains allows transfer of Bitcoin's $1.9 trillion market, enabling new uses like lending and staking.
news.summary: Bitlayer, a developer focused on Bitcoin's Layer-2 technology, has formed partnerships with five blockchains - Base, Starknet (STRK), Arbitrum (ARB), Sonic (S), and Plume Network to bridge Bitcoin's massive $1.9 trillion market with their ecosystems via the BitVM Bridge. The announcement, made at ETH Denver, enables Bitcoin holders to transfer assets across these networks for activities such as lending, staking, and providing liquidity. This initiative aims to expand Bitcoin's utility beyond simply being a static asset, but its success will depend on overcoming technical and market obstacles. With these partnerships, Bitcoin is now connected to chains worth tens of billions, showcasing the trend of various networks integrating Bitcoin. The BitVM Bridge, utilizing the BitVM framework, serves as the initial implementation facilitating these connections.

news.headline: Calix introduces ASM1001 system for broadband providers to enhance network resilience & scaling capabilities. #CALX.
news.summary: Calix, Inc. (NYSE: CALX) has recently announced the expansion of its Aggregation Service Manager (ASM) portfolio with the launch of the Intelligent Access™ ASM1001 system. This addition aims to enhance the Calix Broadband Platform's capabilities. The ASM1001 system facilitates advanced Layer 3 routing further into the network, empowering broadband service providers (BSPs) to establish a robust and distributed service aggregation architecture. This allows for optimized performance and improved operational efficiency. Additionally, new features have been incorporated into Calix Cloud®, boosting its capabilities.

news.headline: CMA experts define 12 principles for secure communication in disasters globally, highlighting importance of secure communication.
news.summary: In Berlin on February 28, 2025, the Critical Messaging Association (CMA) released new guidelines for secure communication during emergencies. This initiative involved experts from the USA, Europe, and Australia. In the last five years, a series of natural disasters and crises underscored the importance of effective communication during critical situations, prompting the development of these principles to enhance response strategies.

This shift in stock performance occurred in response to important economic indicators.

news.summary: Over 15,000 people were affected by the recent flash floods in the region, with 8,500 residents being evacuated from their homes. Emergency services rescued 120 individuals who were trapped in the floodwaters, and unfortunately, six casualties have been reported. The government has allocated $500,000 for immediate relief efforts, providing food, shelter, and medical assistance to those impacted by the disaster. Weather officials have issued warnings for more heavy rainfall in the coming days, urging residents to stay vigilant and follow safety protocols.

news.headline: New Forever Stamps feature Appalachian Trail, spanning 14 states and 2,200 miles. Dedication held at Amicalola Falls State Park.
news.summary: A dedication ceremony was held at Amicalola Falls State Park in Dawsonville, Georgia on Feb. 28, 2025, to commemorate the release of the Appalachian Trail Forever stamps. This postal tribute spans 14 states and nearly 2,200 miles, showcasing stunning images of the trail. The stamps aim to bring a touch of the outdoors to First-Class mail, emphasizing the beauty and significance of the iconic Appalachian Trail.

news.headline: Author J. Wynn Rousuck wins Best Adult Fiction - Humor at DWAA Awards for novel "Please Write: A Novel in Letters" in New York.
news.summary: On February 28, 2025, in New York City, the renowned writer and reporter J. Wynn Rousuck secured a notable achievement by winning the Best Adult Fiction – Humor category at the prestigious Dog Writers Association of America (DWAA) Awards. Rousuck clinched the award for her novel titled "Please Write: A Novel in Letters." The announcement was made during the customary DWAA banquet held in New York.

news.headline: March is set to be Treasure Island's busiest month ever with 10 concerts, $440,000 truck giveaway, watch parties, promotions & family fun.
news.summary: In March 2025, Treasure Island Resort & Casino in Welch, Minnesota will host a series of 10 concerts, along with offering a chance to win a truck giveaway valued at up to $440,000. The month will also feature extensive promotions, sports partner watch parties, and family-friendly activities for spring break. This lineup of events promises a thrilling and entertaining month for visitors looking to experience the excitement at the resort.

news.headline: Apertura supports Broad Institute in developing gene therapy for prion disease using AAV capsid targeting TfR1 for CNS delivery. Innovative approach aims for rapid advancement to clinic.
news.summary: A program centered around prions is using preclinical development data from Apertura and an AAV capsid that targets human Transferrin Receptor 1 (TfR1). This strategy aims to expedite progress towards clinical trials. The unique gene therapy concept will incorporate cutting-edge technologies like CHARM epigenetic editing.
